name: agentdeals
description: Search 1,500+ developer tool deals, compare vendors, check pricing stability, and estimate costs. Free tiers, startup credits, and promotional offers across 53 categories.
long_description:
AgentDeals indexes real, verified pricing data from 1,500+ developer infrastructure vendors across 53 categories. Search deals by keyword, category, or eligibility. Compare vendors side-by-side, check pricing stability and risk, estimate infrastructure costs, get full stack recommendations, and monitor pricing changes — all from within Claude Desktop.

Data is fetched from a hosted API (no local data needed). Tools cover the full lifecycle: discovery, comparison, risk assessment, cost estimation, and ongoing monitoring.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Browse 53 categories of developer infrastructure deals (databases, cloud hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, auth, search, and more).

tools.name: search_offers
tools.description: Find free tiers, credits, and discounts for developer tools. Covers 1,500+ offers from vendors like AWS, Vercel, Supabase, Cloudflare, and more.

tools.name: get_offer_details
tools.description: Get full pricing details for a specific vendor's free tier or deal, with optional alternatives comparison.

tools.name: get_new_offers
tools.description: Check what developer tool deals were recently added or updated within the last N days.

tools.name: get_newest_deals
tools.description: See what's new in the AgentDeals index, sorted by verified date with days_since_update for each result.

tools.name: get_deal_changes
tools.description: Check which developer tools recently changed their pricing or free tiers. Tracks removals, reductions, increases, and restructures.

tools.name: get_stack_recommendation
tools.description: Get a complete free-tier infrastructure stack recommendation for your project based on use case.

tools.name: estimate_costs
tools.description: Estimate infrastructure costs for your current stack at different scales (hobby/startup/growth).

tools.name: compare_services
tools.description: Compare two developer tool vendors side by side — free tier limits, pricing tiers, differentiators, and recent changes.

tools.name: check_vendor_risk
tools.description: Check if a vendor's pricing is stable before depending on their free tier. Returns risk level, change history, and alternatives.

tools.name: audit_stack
tools.description: Audit your infrastructure stack for cost savings, pricing risks, and missing capabilities.

tools.name: get_expiring_deals
tools.description: Check which developer tool deals, free tiers, or credits are expiring soon.
